parameters.jsCode:
// 14 target IDIQs to scan for open-season/on-ramp announcements
const targets = [
  {name: 'Alliant 3 GWAC', agency: 'GSA', keywords: 'Alliant 3 GWAC on-ramp open season'},
  {name: 'MAPS', agency: 'ACC APG', keywords: 'MAPS Multiple Award Professional Services RS3 recompete'},
  {name: '8(a) STARS III', agency: 'GSA', keywords: '8a STARS III GWAC on-ramp'},
  {name: 'CIO-SP4', agency: 'NIH', keywords: 'CIO-SP4 NITAAC follow-on'},
  {name: 'BNATCS', agency: 'FAA', keywords: 'BNATCS FAA air traffic control'},
  {name: 'ITES-3S', agency: 'Army', keywords: 'ITES-3S Army enterprise IT'},
  {name: 'AMAC', agency: 'AFRL', keywords: 'AMAC AFRL research MAC'},
  {name: 'SETIS', agency: 'FAA', keywords: 'SETIS FAA systems engineering'},
  {name: 'SOFGSD', agency: 'SOCOM', keywords: 'SOFGSD SOCOM global services'},
  {name: 'SITEC III', agency: 'SOCOM', keywords: 'SITEC III SOCOM IT'},
  {name: 'VETS 2', agency: 'GSA', keywords: 'VETS 2 SDVOSB GWAC'},
  {name: 'SeaPort-NxG', agency: 'Navy', keywords: 'SeaPort NxG Navy on-ramp rolling'},
  {name: 'ENCORE III', agency: 'DISA', keywords: 'ENCORE III DISA enterprise IT'},
  {name: 'SEWP VI', agency: 'NASA', keywords: 'SEWP VI NASA IT products'}
];

return targets.map(t => ({ json: t }));

parameters.query: INSERT INTO gda_intel_feed (title, source, category, relevance_score, url, body, created_at) SELECT 'ON-RAMP ALERT: ' || '{{ $json.idiq_name }}' || ' - ' || '{{ $json.opp_title }}', 'SAM.gov On-Ramp Scanner', 'on-ramp', 99, '{{ $json.url }}', 'IDIQ: {{ $json.idiq_name }} ({{ $json.idiq_agency }}) | Posted: {{ $json.posted_date }} | Deadline: {{ $json.response_deadline }} | Is On-Ramp: {{ $json.is_on_ramp }}', NOW() WHERE '{{ $json.no_results }}' IS DISTINCT FROM 'true' ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING
